regional_cost_note: Carpet layers in Gisborne typically charge $35–$65/m² supply and lay for mid-range carpet, with premium wool carpet running $80–$180/m². Underlay is additional at $8–$20/m². Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. Get quotes that include underlay, gripper rods, and door trims — these are often excluded.
